parameters.query: SELECT id FROM public.tenants WHERE slug = '{{ $json.tenant_slug }}' AND status = 'active' LIMIT 1;

=SELECT c.content, s.name as source_name,
       1 - (e.embedding <=> '{{ $json.embedding }}'::vector) AS similarity
FROM public.embeddings e
JOIN public.chunks c ON c.id = e.chunk_id
JOIN public.documents d ON d.id = c.document_id
JOIN public.sources s ON s.id = d.source_id
WHERE e.tenant_id = '{{ $json.tenant_id }}'::uuid
  AND 1 - (e.embedding <=> '{{ $json.embedding }}'::vector) >= {{ $json.min_similarity }}
ORDER BY similarity DESC
LIMIT {{ $json.top_k }};

=INSERT INTO voicebot_metrics (id, session_id, step, duration_ms)
VALUES 
  (gen_random_uuid(), '{{ $json.session_id }}', 'rag', {{ $json.metrics.rag_time_ms }}),
  (gen_random_uuid(), '{{ $json.session_id }}', 'llm', {{ $json.metrics.llm_time_ms }}),
  (gen_random_uuid(), '{{ $json.session_id }}', 'total', {{ $json.metrics.total_time_ms }});
